title: SynapCores/synapcores-agent
summary: SynapCores/synapcores-agent 是一个无需框架的AI支持代理，SynapCores作为大脑，集内存、RAG、工具路由和生成于一体。提供浏览器聊天小部件和实时大脑调试侧边栏。30秒内即可Fork并运行。该项目利用Python实现，具有框架自由、AI代理和聊天机器人等特性。，基于模型推理的架构
description: Real, framework-free AI support agent where SynapCores is the brain — memory, RAG, tool routing, generation in one database. Browser chat widget + live Brain debug sidebar. Fork and run in 30s.
